events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll read the gas monitor image first, then write the assessment directly to `/app/answer.json` in the requested schema.

events.label: assistant
events.text: The visible O2, LEL, and CO values are within ordinary confined-space entry limits. The H2S channel is not giving a valid numeric reading, so the permit can’t be signed off from this test screen.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -l /app/media/gasmeter_012.png && cat > /tmp/answer.json.tmp <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"planned\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"non-compliant\", \"failed\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 0,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.93,
  \"event_time\": 0.0,
  \"rate\": 0.0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"O2 reads 20.9 percent by volume, within acceptable entry range.\",
    \"LEL reads 1 percent, within acceptable entry range.\",
    \"CO reads 8 ppm, within acceptable entry range.\",
    \"H2S channel displays -- instead of a valid ppm reading; toxic atmosphere has not been verified acceptable.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Do not authorize confined space entry from this test.\",
    \"Remove the meter from service or correct the H2S channel fault, then bump test/calibrate per site procedure.\",
    \"Retest the permit space atmosphere with a functional 4-gas monitor before issuing the entry permit.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"Entry cannot be authorized because the permit-required confined space pre-entry test does not include a valid H2S ppm reading. OSHA 1910.146 requires acceptable entry conditions to be verified before entry; a missing toxic gas channel leaves the atmosphere unverified even though O2, LEL, and CO are acceptable.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"OSHA 29 CFR 1910.146(b) - acceptable entry conditions\",
    \"OSHA 29 CFR 1910.146(d)(5)(iii) - test or monitor permit space atmospheric hazards before entry\",
    \"OSHA 29 CFR 1910.146(f) - entry permit conditions and test results\"
  ]
}
EOF
mv /tmp/answer.json.tmp /app/answer.json
python3 -m json.tool /app/answer.json >/tmp/answer.json.validated
cat /tmp/answer.json.validated"
